summary: Blueprint for SMB-focused Meta Ads manager with two killer features: (1) closed-loop CTWA attribution via Omoikiri WhatsApp using HMAC ref token embedded in prefilled text, (2) Meta Ads Library competitor analyst. Stack: Fastify + Zod env + Pino + graphile-worker (pg-native, port 5432) + separate Supabase project + HTTP webhook bridge to Omoikiri. Frontend: Next.js 14 App Router + shadcn/ui + Tremor + TanStack Table. Security: pgcrypto aes-256-gcm token storage, RLS-first multi-tenancy, Meta App Review v0 scope = ads_read only. 14-section doc with ASCII data-flow diagram, R1-R13 risks, Phase 0-3 roadmap, 12-table SQL schema, 9 endpoints, 7 screens, cost math ($0.40/SMB@100 → $0.12/SMB@1000), 6 open questions for Adil.
